lessons.title: Introduction to Lists
lessons.description: What is a list? Creating lists with list() and understanding heterogeneity.

lessons.title: Adding, Removing, and Modifying List Elements
lessons.description: Dynamically change lists by adding, deleting, or updating components.

lessons.title: Working with Nested Lists and List Functions
lessons.description: Handling lists within lists, and useful functions like str(), lapply(), names().

lessons.title: Converting Between Lists and Vectors
lessons.description: Using unlist() to flatten lists, and splitting vectors into lists.
